phrases.text_local: Scusi, dove posso trovare un gondoliere ufficiale, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, DOH-veh POS-soh troh-VAH-reh oon gon-do-LYEH-reh oo-fee-CHEAH-leh, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.local: Ai posteggi ufficiali, lungo il canale.
likely_response.pronunciation: AHEE poh-STEHJ-jee oof-fee-chee-AH-lee LOON-goh EEL kah-NAH-leh
likely_response.translation_en: At official stands, along the canal.

responses.english: At official stands, along the canal.
responses.phonetic: AHEE poh-STEHJ-jee oof-fee-chee-AH-lee LOON-goh EEL kah-NAH-leh
responses.french: Ai posteggi ufficiali, lungo il canale.

phrases.text_local: Scusi, come funziona il traghetto per attraversare, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOOzee KOmeh foonTSYOHnah eel trahGETtoh pehr ahttrahvehrSAHreh, pehr fahVOHreh?

likely_response.local: Si paga a bordo, segua la fila.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE PAH-gah AH BOHR-doh seh-GOO-ah LAH FEE-lah
likely_response.translation_en: You pay on board, follow the line.

responses.english: You pay on board, follow the line.
responses.phonetic: SEE PAH-gah AH BOHR-doh seh-GOO-ah LAH FEE-lah
responses.french: Si paga a bordo, segua la fila.

phrases.text_local: Scusi, qual è il lato migliore per le foto, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, kwal EH eel LAH-toh mee-LYOH-reh per leh FOH-toh, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.local: Sulla destra, andando verso Santa Maria.
likely_response.pronunciation: SOOL-lah DEH-strah ahn-DAHN-doh VEHR-soh SAHN-tah mah-REE-ah
likely_response.translation_en: On the right, going towards Santa Maria.

responses.english: On the right, going towards Santa Maria.
responses.phonetic: SOOL-lah DEH-strah ahn-DAHN-doh VEHR-soh SAHN-tah mah-REE-ah
responses.french: Sulla destra, andando verso Santa Maria.

phrases.text_local: Scusi, dove si prenotano i taxi acquei, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, DOH-veh see pre-NOH-tah-noh ee TAK-see AK-kweh-ee, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: At the stand near the stop.

responses.english: At the stand near the stop.
